title: Content Intelligence Foundation Closure Evidence

foundation_stages.title: Full Source-of-Truth Inventory Audit
foundation_stages.closure_meaning: Public article inventory, governed/unguided article counts, scaffold/production-intelligence inventory and content-intelligence gaps are recorded.

foundation_stages.title: Content Intelligence Schema
foundation_stages.closure_meaning: Content-intelligence folder structure and schema families are present.

foundation_stages.title: Scaffold Output Preservation Register
foundation_stages.closure_meaning: Scaffold output inventory and preservation controls are recorded without moving/copying/deleting scaffold outputs.

foundation_stages.title: Existing Public Article Classification
foundation_stages.closure_meaning: All current public articles are classified as test corpus, long-form upgrade and visual enrichment candidates, not final quality content.

foundation_stages.title: Long-Form Article Standard
foundation_stages.closure_meaning: 1500-2200 word standard, 2-5 references, visual/data requirements, scoring gates and publish-readiness gates are defined.

foundation_stages.title: Long-Form Production Queue
foundation_stages.closure_meaning: All 77 public articles are mapped into a governance queue without public mutation or publishing.

foundation_stages.title: Content Packet Upgrade Dry-Run Review
foundation_stages.closure_meaning: Batch 01 dry-run selection is recorded while generation, rewrite and scaffold import remain blocked.

foundation_stages.title: Batch 01 Content Packet Upgrade Planning
foundation_stages.closure_meaning: Batch 01 planning entries are recorded while content-packet generation remains blocked.

foundation_stages.title: Content Intelligence Foundation Alignment Review
foundation_stages.closure_meaning: Transition handbook alignment is reconciled and AG06I-AG06Z remaining path is corrected.

foundation_stages.title: Visual / Data / Infographic Requirement Schema Closure
foundation_stages.closure_meaning: Visual/data/infographic requirements are defined without asset generation or article mutation.

foundation_stages.title: Reference and Source Credibility Schema Closure
foundation_stages.closure_meaning: Source taxonomy, credibility tiers, lifecycle statuses, rejection reasons and link-health governance are defined without URL fetching or insertion.

foundation_stages.title: JSONL-first Content Intelligence Store Governance
foundation_stages.closure_meaning: Future JSONL-first store governance, manifest, record families and line contract are defined without JSONL production writes.

foundation_stages.title: Publish Queue and Approval State Register
foundation_stages.closure_meaning: Approval states, checkpoints, transition rules and publish-readiness gate groups are defined; all entries remain not approved and not publish-ready.

ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.title: Visual / Data / Infographic Requirement Schema Closure
ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.purpose: Create the dedicated schema and governance closure for visual intelligence requirements across future long-form Featured Reads.
ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.blocked_scope: visual generation, article mutation, CSS/JS mutation, publishing

ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.title: Reference and Source Credibility Schema Closure
ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.purpose: Define candidate-source, approved-source, rejected-source, verification-status and link-health governance before source discovery or insertion.
ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.blocked_scope: web fetching by script, reference insertion, article mutation, public publishing

ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.title: JSONL-first Content Intelligence Store Governance
ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.purpose: Define durable JSONL-first storage conventions for content packets, source candidates, visual plans, quality reviews and learning snapshots.
ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.blocked_scope: content generation, public mutation, backend activation, Supabase activation

ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.title: Publish Queue and Approval State Register
ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.purpose: Define draft, review, approved, publish-ready, published and rejected states before any production article upgrade.
ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.blocked_scope: publishing, article mutation, reference insertion, backend activation

ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.title: Content Intelligence Foundation Closure
ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.purpose: Close AG06 foundation after AG06I-AG06L are validated.

ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.title: Long-Form Article Generator / Visual Agent / Quality Scorer / Semi-Auto Queue
ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.purpose: Begin production-tooling work only after AG06Z closure and explicit user approval.
ag06h_r1_corrected_remaining_path.blocked_scope: automatic public publishing until separately approved

permanent_foundation_controls: No current public article is final Drishvara-quality content.
Current public articles remain test corpus and upgrade candidates.
Future long-form Featured Reads require 1500-2200 words.
Future long-form Featured Reads require 2-5 verified references.
Future long-form Featured Reads require visual/data/infographic planning.
Reference discovery and insertion require later explicit approved stages.
Content packet generation requires later explicit approved AG07+ stage.
Scaffold outputs remain preserved and cannot be copied, moved, deleted or imported without explicit approval.
JSONL-first store is defined but no production JSONL append is allowed in AG06.
Publish queue approval states are defined but no approval transition or publish-ready lock is allowed in AG06.
Backend, Auth, Supabase, API, subscriber and public dynamic activation remain blocked.
AG07 production tooling may begin only after AG06Z closure and explicit approval.

ag07_readiness_boundary.ag07_first_recommended_scope: Long-form content packet generator design / dry-run only, with no public article mutation and no publishing.
blocked_until_separate_approval: visual asset generation for public use
